itemListElement.reviewBody: It is too good actually I don't study in jpis I only go there for annual function from jpgs the where I study

The way JPIS is preparing its students for admissions to world's top universities, providing them with all the necessary opportunities, is truly commendable.

I am deeply thankful to the management, especially Mr. Ayush Periwal, for taking a keen interest in helping its students achieve great success.
I study here and it is a very supportive school it has many activities to do and all teachers are kind here you can also learn more languages

Jayshree Periwal  International School in Jaipur holds a special place in our hearts.  We are really happy with the decision we took to choose this school in Jaipur. When we moved to India almost six years ago, navigating the transition for my daughters into a new school setting, amidst a different country and language, was no small feat. Yet, thanks to the unwavering support and genuine care of the teachers and staff, my daughters quickly found their footing, feeling as though they had found a second home. Their enthusiasm for school was palpable, and they never wanted to miss a single day.
With its adherence to the esteemed International Baccalaureate (IB) curriculum, the school maintains rigorous standards in core subjects, fostering a deep and well-rounded academic growth.
Moreover, the diverse range of extracurricular activities, coupled with top-notch facilities, adds richness to the overall educational experience.
Beyond academics, the school's competitive spirit shines through, as it diligently prepares students for the challenges they'll face in their future careers. Through a curriculum designed to nurture critical thinking and problem-solving abilities, students are enveloped in a warm and supportive atmosphere, ensuring they feel secure every step of the way on their educational journey.
The school actively engages in International collaborations with other institutions, fostering cultural exchange among students and participating in International and National sports competitions and art exhibitions.
Annually, the school organizes educational trips, a commendable practice in India, always prioritizing the safety of the students.
The school hosts spectacular annual functions, featuring impressive performances where every student shines. Such displays are rarely witnessed in European schools. The school also hosts an Annual Sports Day, showcasing the athletic talents of its students. However, it would be advantageous for all students to participate in this event, presenting a wide array of sports practiced throughout the year, such as volleyball, tennis, skating, squash, and more.
A notable aspect of this institution is its emphasis on public speaking, which contributes to enhancing students' self-esteem and preparing them for their professional future. This focus represents a significant improvement compared to certain European educational institutions.
We are thoroughly satisfied with JPIS, as it consistently demonstrates improvement and a commitment to staying updated year after year, striving to be recognized as the premier school in India.

JPIS has been a blessing for my child. The school focuses on the overall growth of their students which helps inculcate various talents in kids at a young age. It’s a world class institution par excellence for educating and imparting the best of knowledge and culture in children.

“As a parent, I am immensely grateful for the holistic development my child has experienced at JPIS. The journey from grade 1 to grade 12 has been nothing short of transformative. The nurturing environment fostered self-reflection, allowing my child to grow both academically and personally.

I rarely worried about my child’s journey because I had full confidence in the school’s dedicated teachers. They consistently demonstrated a commitment to doing what’s best for each student, guiding them to recognize their weaknesses and harness their strengths.

Thanks to Ayush sir’s and Aakriti ma’am’s unwavering support and guidance, my child has not only continued on his academic journey but has also been equipped with the skills and mindset necessary for future success.”

JPIS Mahapura has been the best decision I could have made for my child. The upbringing and  nurturing provided by the school for the holistic development of the child is tremendous. My child was non inclined towards art but suddenly decided she wanted to give it a try in grade nine. I were very skeptical but the school convinced me to let her dream and try it out. And would you believe it - she topped India in this subject under the guidance of the school and her mentors. The confidence this imbibed in her was just amazing. The teachers and the school founders are just a call away for whatever guidance the child needs and I guess this passion and commitment to excellence shows in their outstanding college admissions. Thank you JPIS for moulding my child for the world of tomorrow.

I have been associated with JPIS since the past 8 years with both of my boys studying there, one passed out in 2021 and one is currently in the 11th Grade. For both my sons, JPIS has provided an excellent environment to nurture them in their academics as well as in their extracurricular endeavours. The standout feature is the personalised attention given to each student, especially in the college application process. Under Ayush and Aakriti’s guidance, my elder son was able to get accepted into the top universities in the world namely Penn, Yale, Dartmouth, Brown and UC Berkley. They provided him with top notch expertise on his entire college application and I’m sure the same will happen for my younger son when he applies for colleges. JPIS’s academic brilliance is also top notch with the creme de la creme of the teachers available to guide the children through IGCSE and IB.

Dear JPIS Administration,

I would like to express my heartfelt gratitude for the exceptional mentorship and support my son Sanay Khurana has received during his time at school,  from the Director JPIS Ayush Sir. He is currently a student of Grade 12 in JPIS.  I would like to extend my sincerest thanks to him for his visionary guidance, motivating presence, and unwavering dedication in nurturing  Sanay under his care. The expertise and dedication demonstrated by him , particularly in assisting with college choices and project opportunities, have exceeded our expectations. The college counseling team’s insightful advice, personalized attention, and comprehensive approach have empowered my son to make informed decisions about his future academic and professional endeavors.

Since enrolling at JPIS, Sanay has experienced tremendous growth, both academically and personally.  Despite the fact that he came from  CBSE background to the IBDP curriculum which is extremely challenging, Sanay has thrived in school.  The nurturing atmosphere of the school, coupled with the right balance of discipline and enjoyment, has fostered an environment conducive to his development and success. Additionally, the opportunity for him to stay independent in the hostel which is  so comfortable and state of the art for students,  has been invaluable in helping him learn responsibility and self-reliance.

I am truly grateful for the positive impact JPIS has had on my son's life and education. Please convey my appreciation to all the faculty and staff members who contribute to creating such a supportive and enriching environment for the students.

Warmest Regards
Arusha Khurana
